DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING AND QA. DEFENDANT YEISON OCHOA IS PRESENT . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCHOA, YEISON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT OCHOA, YEISON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
